name: Douglas Elliman Inc.
summary: Overview Douglas Elliman Inc. is a holding company that, through its subsidiaries, is engaged in the real estate services business. Douglas Elliman owns Douglas Elliman Realty, LLC, one of the largest residential brokerage companies in the New York metropolitan area, which includes New York City, Long Island, the Hamptons, Westchester, Connecticut and New Jersey, and also conducts operations in Florida, California, Texas, Colorado, Nevada, Massachusetts, Maryland, Virginia, and Washington D.C.
